name: Natl Closet - Get Serviceable Zip Codes by Division

content.query:
/** Get the zip codes for SWR **/
SELECT 
brz.[ZipCode]
,brz.[LP_BranchID]
,prg.[ProductGroup]
,brz.[Division]
 FROM 
 [EDW].[DIM_BRANCH_ZIP] brz
 ,[EDW].[DIM_BRANCH] brn
 ,[EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT_GROUP] prg
 where
 brz.ProductGroupID = prg.ProductGroupID
 and brz.BranchID = brn.BranchID
 and brz.Division = 'SWR'
 and ZipCode not in ('00000')
 and prg.[Active] = 'True'
 and brn.[Active] = 'True'
 and brz.ProductGroupID in ('SWR-COR') 
 and brn.BranchID in ('SWR-AUSHO', 'SWR-DALHO', 'SWR-SA')
 order BY
prg.[ProductGroup]
,brz.[LP_BranchID]
,brz.[ZipCode]
